case_title: BELFOR, WILLIAM VS JOHNSON, WILLIE JR.

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, WILLIE JR.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,330.00 FILED BY BELFOR, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, WILLIE JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S FORM OF ASSETS MAILED BACK TO HIM WITH INFO TO MAIL FORM TO CREDITOR.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, WILLIE JR.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,379.16 AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, WILLIE JR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELFOR, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, WILLIE JR. $2,238.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,283.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
